name: fp8 block-scale dense GEMM

op.signature: out[M,N] = (A_deq) @ (B_deq).T  with A per-token-group fp8 e4m3, B per-block fp8 e4m3

preconditions: block == 128 (DeepSeek block-scale convention); operands already quantized to fp8 e4m3

numerics.notes: Parity target is dequant-then-fp32-matmul. Both backends consume identical fp8 operands and dequant identically, so the only divergence is fp32 accumulation order (empirically rel < 1e-3 on the fp32-dot path). Tolerances left honest-loose to also cover the opt-in bf16-dot path. out_dtype follows the point dtype.
